Original_Definition: (adv) singularly. [id] သ္ကေက်သ္ကေက်သ္ကာသ္ကာ။
(v) be lost in obscurity, disappear, sink, be submerged, disappear for some length of time.

English: Sink in mire.  လၞက်ခရီု။
Original_Definition: (n) sink in mire. [id.] လၞက်ခရီု(မ်)။

English: Sink into a coma.    ဟဳမံၚ်  be in a coma
Original_Definition: 1 (v) faint, lose consciousness, sink into a coma.    ဟဳမံၚ် (v) be in a coma.

English: Sink into the mire.  ဂၞက်ခရီု။
Original_Definition: (v) sink into the mire. [id] ဂၞက်ခရီု။
ရံၚ် sink တေံညိ။
ရံၚ် sink တေံညိ။
(adj) sinkable.

3 (n) sinking in, immersion, degree of immersion, depth. [id] ဒၞက်။    လုပ်ဍာ်ဒၞက်တ္ၜံၚ် (n) he went into the water up to his knees.    ဟိုတ်နူကွဳဒၞက်ပိုဲကၠောံဟွံဂွံ (n) because of the cart sinking in we could not get across. [Cf.] ဗၞက်၊ လျိုဟ်။    [Der.] နက် (v) to be deep, to be sink in.     ဒၞက်ခရီု (v) to stick in the mud.
(n) sinking in, immersion, degree of immersion, depth, the depth of which any weight sinks, [id] ဗၞက်။

English: Sinner.  မၞိဟ်ပ္ကီုပရာပ်ဒုဟ်၊ မၞိဟ်သွပွအကုသဵု။
Mon: မၞိဟ်ကၠောန်ကမၠောန်အကုသဵု
Original_Definition: (n) sinner. [id.] မၞိဟ်ပ္ကီုပရာပ်ဒုဟ်၊ မၞိဟ်သွပွအကုသဵု(ဝ်)။

Mon: ယဲမုဟ်ၜိုၚ်ဇြိုက်
Original_Definition: (n) sinusistis.
(n) mouthful, sip, what one swallows at one time.

English: Sip.    သုၚ်မွဲၚိတ်  have a sip.  ပါၚ်။
Original_Definition: 2 (n) mouthful, sip.    သုၚ်မွဲၚိတ် (n) have a sip. [Cf.] ပါၚ်။
2 (v) induce flow of liquid or gas by means of an instrument such as enema, catheter, siphon, etc.
ရံၚ် siphon တေံညိ။

(n) sir, madam, lord, used in replying to the call of a superior and at the close of a petition. [ps.] [Bur] standing alone, calls for repetition of utterance, eh? {formal, [esp.] in oratorical style}, final in sent, implies deference between the persons addressed, {Saim} standing alone, acknowledges an utterance, yes, all right.
(part) {to dog} lie down, sir!

English: Sir.    ဍေံဟုံမံၚ်ဍာ်  he was having his bath.    တိခိုဟ်လေဝ်တိတ်မံၚ်ကီုရ  on good land you do get that much yield.    တုဟ်မိဟ်ကဵုအးမံၚ်  scrub the dirt till he is clean.    နူဂယးသ္ဒးဍုန်မံၚ်ပုၚ်  i shall be cooking the dinner in the morning.    ဗှေ်တံမံၚ်မိပ်စမိပ်မံၚ်ရဟာ  are you all in good health?    ဗှေ်မံၚ်အဏံကၠာ အဲအာသ္ၚိဍာ်မွဲလစုတ်ဏီ  you stay here a minute or two
Original_Definition: 7 (v) to remain, to stay, continue in a place or state, live, reside, to remain quiet, to tarry, to dwell, to be.    အ္စာပလေဝ်နာဍဳဗ္ဂပ်မံၚ်စက်နာဍဳ (v) the watch repairer is putting the works together.    အရေဝ်ရဲဂဒဵုဟီုဂှ်ရဲခၠိုၚ်ကၠိုဟ်မံၚ်စိုတ်ဟာ (v) do Roa Khamiung {Bilugyun people} understand the speech of Roa Kaday {Kado people}   အဲဂၠာဲမံၚ်ဗှေ်လံကွေံရ (v) I have been looking for you for a long time?    အဲစိုပ်မံၚ်အဏံမသုန်သၞာံလောန်ကၠုၚ်တုဲဣရ (v) it is five years since I  came here.    ကောန်ၚာ်ဏံမံၚ်ကွေံညိဟွံလရိုအ် (v) your baby is ver quiet, he does not cyr at all.    ဇို်ၚ်ဍေံဂိမံၚ်ကၠဵုကိတ်လဝ် (v) he has a bad leg, a dog bit it.    ဍေံမံၚ်ဟွံမိပ် (v) he is not well. [id] ဍေံမံၚ်စဟွံခိုဟ်။    ဍေံသ္ဒးဒုၚ်မံၚ်ဘဲၚေက်ဂိအ္စာ (v) he is suffering from toothache, sir.    ဍေံဟုံမံၚ်ဍာ် (v) he was having his bath.    တိခိုဟ်လေဝ်တိတ်မံၚ်ကီုရ (v) on good land you do get that much yield.    တုဟ်မိဟ်ကဵုအးမံၚ် (v) scrub the dirt till he is clean.    နူဂယးသ္ဒးဍုန်မံၚ်ပုၚ် (v) I shall be cooking the dinner in the morning.    ဗှေ်တံမံၚ်မိပ်စမိပ်မံၚ်ရဟာ (v) are you all in good health?    ဗှေ်မံၚ်အဏံကၠာ အဲအာသ္ၚိဍာ်မွဲလစုတ်ဏီ (v) you stay here a minute or two, I am just going to lavatory. [as va.] shows durative aspect usually embracing or extending up to, to point out time, rarely generic.    ဗှေ်မံၚ်အဏံလံမံၚ်ရဟာ (v) have you been living here long.    မိကဵုအဲဂၠိုၚ်မံၚ်ဂှ် (v) you have given me a lot, Mummy.    မာန်မံၚ်ရ (v) they keep on winning.    မၞိဟ်ယဲမံၚ်ဂှ်ခိုဟ်အာဣရဟာ (v) are the  sick man has recovered? [Syn.] ခိုဟ်အာ၊ ခိုဟ်တိုန်။    လ္ပဖျေံမံၚ်ဇကုဗှေ်ဂၠိုၚ်ဂှ် (v) do not spend too much time making yourself look nice.    သွက်တၟုဲအာကၠုၚ်ဂွံမံၚ်ဖျေံလဝ်သ္ၚိကျာခိုဟ်ခိုဟ် (v) make the veranda look nice so that our guests can use it. Occasionally this aspect applies to the result of the act specified. [Cf.] ထတ်ယုက်။ [Cf.] first sense, တဴ၊ သ္ပဒတဴ၊ သ္ပဒတန်။    [Der.] ဒၟံၚ် (n) dwelling place.    ဗၟံၚ် (v) to house.

English: Sir.    ဍေံဟွံသ္ဒးကဵုကောဒေံဍေံ  she does not get on well with her brothers.    တ္ၚဲသိုက်ဂှ်အဲသ္ဒးတိုန်ဍုၚ်  i have to go into town on friday.  forming quasi-passive.    ဒဗသ္ဒး  to encounter
Original_Definition: 2 (v) to hit {a mark}, meet with, reach {goal}, be correct, apposite, to fit.    အမူပိုဲသ္ဒးထောံအာ (v) my uncle has died. [Cf.] ကလိလောန်အာ၊ ချိုတ်အာ၊ စုတိအာ၊ တ္ၜးဘဝ၊ ပဝ်အာ၊ သ္ပကာဂစိုတ်၊ သ္ပပရိနိဗ္ဗာန်။    ဣဂှ်ဟွံသ္ဒးအလိုက် (v) that is not convenient.    အဲဍိက်သ္ဒးဗက်ကဵုဟာ (v) am I to come too, sir?    အဲသ္ဒးအာရဟာ (v) may I go?    ခ္ဍိၚ်သ္ဒး (v) to trip over.    ဂပ်ဂဝ်သ္ဒး (v) ought.    ဇီုသ္ဒး (v) to crash into. Foll. Main (v) to be able to, to chance to, to be involuntary or through negligence.    ကမၠောန်ဏံဗှ်ေကၠောန်သ္ဒးရးဟာ (v) can you be suitable to do this work?    ဍုၚ်ဏံဂၠံၚ်ထုဲကွေံ အဲအာကၠုၚ်ဟွံသ္ဒး (v) the streets of this town are in such a bustle, I cannot get round at all.    သီပေဲါရပိုဲစဴသ္ဒးရသဒှ်(ဟ်) (v) the party is over, so now we can go home.    ညာတ်သ္ဒး (v) to chance to see.    မိၚ်သ္ဒး (v) to get to hear of.    အဃောၚ္ၚုဟ်ဂၠဴတိုန်အဲသွံသ္ဒးဂၠဴအဲၚ္ၚုဟ်တန်တန် (v) I went and sold my cattle cheap just when the price was going up.    ဗှ်ေသ္တီအဲသ္ဒးဟာ (v) do you remember me?    ဍေံသ္ဒးဒုၚ်မံၚ်ဘဲၚေက်ဂိအ္စာ (v) he is suffering from toothache, sir.    ဍေံဟွံသ္ဒးကဵုကောဒေံဍေံ(ဟ်) (v) she does not get on well with her brothers.    တ္ၚဲသိုက်ဂှ်အဲသ္ဒးတိုန်ဍုၚ် (v) I have to go into town on Friday. {b} forming quasi-passive.    ဒဗသ္ဒး (v) to encounter, chance to meet.    ဒိသ္ဒး (v) to collied with.    ဒၞပ်တံဏံသ္ဒးကဵုဗှ်ေကွေံ(ဟ်) (v) these shoes fit you really well.    ပန်ဂစေံဂှ်ဟွံသ္ဒး (v) he shot at the bird and missed. [id.] လောန်တုဲလ္ပဟီု(မ်)။    ဟဵုအရေဝ်ဆသ္ဒးကရိုက်ဂှ်(ဟ်) (v) say just enough and no more. [Cf.] ဂွံ(အ်)၊ စုက်၊ စပ်၊ ဇီု(မ်)၊ ဍာံ(မ်)၊ ဒိ၊ ဒုၚ်၊ ဒွံ(အ်)၊ ဖစပ်၊ လုက်။    [Der.] ဗ္ဒး (v) to bring together.

English: Sir.    တ္ၚဲသိုက်ဂှ် အဲဒးတိုန်ဍုၚ်  i have to go into town on friday. 2. foll. main  to be able to
